description: Create a three-column content slide on the Technology Vision research methodology, with introductory text on the left and detailed research process bullets across the middle and right columns.

header.kicker: Technology Vision 2025 | AI: A Declaration of Autonomy
header.headline: About the Technology Vision

left.body:
For 25 years, Accenture has developed the Technology Vision report as a systematic review across the enterprise landscape to identify emerging technology trends that will have the greatest impact on companies, government agencies, and other organizations in the coming years.

This year the trends look three to seven years into the future, while remaining relevant across industries and actionable for businesses today.

center.title: Accenture Technology and Accenture Research collaborate on the annual research process, which this year included:

items.text: Horizon scanning research and data science analysis
items.sub: Leveraging semantic text analysis and LLMs to extract insights from datasets including academic papers, investment trends and earnings call transcripts to uncover key developments and trends shaping the evolving technology landscape.
To gather opinions from innovation experts and researchers across the organization, in addition to interviews with technology luminaries, industry experts, and business leaders.
Across 21 industries to understand their perspectives and organizational priorities regarding emerging technologies. The survey was fielded from October to December 2024 across 28 countries.

right.body: As a shortlist of themes emerges from the research process, the Technology Vision team works to validate and refine the set of trends. The themes are weighed for their relevance to real-world business challenges. The Technology Vision team seeks ideas that transcend the well-known drivers of technological change, concentrating instead on the themes that will soon start to appear on the C-level agendas of most enterprises.
